headline: Yum Brands Slices Off Pizza Hut For $2.3 Billion. Shares Rise.
summary: Yum Brands agrees to sell struggling Pizza Hut to a private equity firm and a China-based license partner for a total of $2.3 billion.

raw.headline: Yum Brands Slices Off Pizza Hut For $2.3 Billion. Shares Rise.
raw.summary: Yum Brands agrees to sell struggling Pizza Hut to a private equity firm and a China-based license partner for a total of $2.3 billion.

headline: HUNGRY HOWIE'S APPOINTS JIMMY SIMONTE AS EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT OF MARKETING
summary: Hungry Howie's, the originator of Flavored Crust® pizza, announced today that Jimmy Simonte has joined the company as Executive Vice President of Marketing. In his new role, Simonte will lead the brand's marketing strategy and work closely with franchisees to support overall growth.

raw.headline: HUNGRY HOWIE'S APPOINTS JIMMY SIMONTE AS EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT OF MARKETING
raw.summary: Hungry Howie's, the originator of Flavored Crust® pizza, announced today that Jimmy Simonte has joined the company as Executive Vice President of Marketing. In his new role, Simonte will lead the brand's marketing strategy and work closely with franchisees to support overall growth.

headline: Why Yum! Brands just sold the iconic Pizza Hut chain to LongRange Capital and Yum China
summary: Yum! Brands said on Tuesday morning that it has entered into definitive agreements to sell Pizza Hut for $2.7 billion. It's a two-part transaction.

raw.headline: Why Yum! Brands just sold the iconic Pizza Hut chain to LongRange Capital and Yum China
raw.summary: Yum! Brands said on Tuesday morning that it has entered into definitive agreements to sell Pizza Hut for $2.7 billion. It's a two-part transaction.

headline: Yum! Brands Is Selling One Of America's Most Iconic Pizza Chains For $2.3 Billion— Here's What To Know
summary: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to LongRange Capital for $1.5 billion, while China ops go to Yum China for $1.2 billion, boosting focus and restructuring strategy.

raw.headline: Yum! Brands Is Selling One Of America's Most Iconic Pizza Chains For $2.3 Billion— Here's What To Know
raw.summary: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to LongRange Capital for $1.5 billion, while China ops go to Yum China for $1.2 billion, boosting focus and restructuring strategy.

headline: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China for $2.7 billion
summary: Yum Brands is selling Pizza Hut, capping off years of struggles for the pizza chain.

raw.headline: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China for $2.7 billion
